examples: Aberrant somatic hypermutation and deregulation of the oncogene BCL-6 are associated with lymphomagenesis.
So what would you guess about these aberrant AOL users?
Aberrant behaviour, often brought on by boredom, is not unusual in zoo animals.
Doctors have spent decades using drugs to tweak aberrant brain chemicals, with only limited success.
But it does mean that far from being an aberrant behaviour, psychopathy may be disturbingly normal.
